LocaleLayout.title: InovaSoft | Premium digital solutions
LocaleLayout.description: Websites, web systems and sophisticated digital experiences for companies that want to grow with performance and strategy.

Home.heroTitle: We craft premium digital experiences for brands ready to grow.
Home.heroLead: InovaSoft turns ideas into sophisticated digital products—modern design, performance, and go-to-market strategy to generate leads and sales.

methodSteps.4: 04. Launch, technical SEO, and ongoing support

a.title: Corporate websites and landing pages
a.description: Strategic pages to build authority, capture leads, and turn visitors into real opportunities.

b.title: Custom e-commerce and portals
b.description: High-performance platforms for catalog, sales, payments, and streamlined administration.

c.title: Web systems, APIs, and databases
c.description: Robust architecture to digitize operations and integrate processes securely at scale.

Home.inevolvingTitle: InEvolving: a real, testable product ready to scale
Home.inevolvingBody: This project showcases our ability to deliver complete systems with authentication, dashboards, and a user-first experience—so stakeholders quickly see technology, impact, and outcomes.

whyItems.1: A navigable product to validate usability and business flows.
whyItems.2: Modern architecture focused on security and performance.
whyItems.3: Clean code that accelerates iterations and new features.
whyItems.4: An experience ready for national and international markets.

differentials.1: Lean senior squad: strategy, UX, and engineering in one workflow.
differentials.2: ROI-focused delivery aimed at sales and operations.
differentials.3: Rapid prototyping, data-informed validation, and continuous improvement.
differentials.4: Clean React/Next.js code built for international growth.

frontend.title: Modern front-end
frontend.text: React, Next.js, and TypeScript with UX and SEO in mind.

cloud.title: Cloud and deploy
cloud.text: Cloud architecture with CI/CD, monitoring, and scale.

security.title: Security
security.text: Strong authentication, validation, and data protection practices.

performance.title: Performance
performance.text: Core Web Vitals tuned for conversion and ranking.

Home.footerTagline: We build elegant digital products designed for growth.

PortfolioPage.title: Cases organized by technology and expertise
PortfolioPage.lead: A scalable structure: add new projects per tab by updating the data file and translation JSON files.
PortfolioPage.howBody: Add metadata in src/data/portfolio.ts and translated copy in messages/{pt,en,es}.json under portfolio.projects.

wordpress.label: WordPress sites
wordpress.description: Landing pages, corporate sites, and WordPress portals focused on conversion, SEO, and performance.

react.label: React projects
react.description: Modern web apps with React and Next.js—premium UX and scalable architecture.

mobile.label: Mobile apps (PWA / Native)
mobile.description: Mobile apps for operations, sales, and customer engagement—PWA and native.

backendJava.label: Java back-end
backendJava.description: Corporate Java APIs and services for system integration and robust processing.
